task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "打开微信应用中的目标文章"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "点击右上角的三点菜单按钮"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "选择复制链接或分享到其他应用"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "将链接粘贴到桌面浏览器中测试访问性"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "发送HTTP请求以验证链接有效性"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "解析HTML文档以检测关键DOM元素是否存在"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "如果被重定向到微信登录页面，使用开发者工具模拟移动设备"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "刷新页面以尝试绕过重定向限制"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "保存文章内容为文本文件"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "对文章内容进行截图保存"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "通过手机分享菜单导出为PDF（如支持）"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "清理文章内容中的多余空白和换行符"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "识别并提取文章中的子标题（h2, h3等）"}, {"id": "Node14", "description": "将文章内容组织为Markdown格式"}, {"id": "Node15", "description": "保存文章为Markdown文件"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "navigate"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "selectOption"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "pasteLink"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "validateURL"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "parseHTML"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "detectRedirect"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "refreshPage"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "saveAlternative"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "exportPDF"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node12", "type": "cleanFormatting"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node13", "type": "extractHeadings"}, {"source": "Node13", "target": "Node14", "type": "formatAsMarkdown"}, {"source": "Node14", "target": "Node15", "type": "saveAsMarkdown"}]}
